text.title: Agency Cash-Flow Friday Routine Failure Modes

antipattern.symptom: Owner skips 3 Fridays under client load; surprise cash crunch in month 2.
AR>30d flagged amber 4 weeks running; nobody chases; client goes 90d late.
antipattern.fix: Schema rejects amber with empty action.

antipattern.symptom: Owner says 'a few months' when asked; no number.
antipattern.fix: Runway months MUST be a number in ledger entry.

antipattern.symptom: Owner can't see trend; surprised by AR drift.
antipattern.fix: Append to ledger CSV each Friday.
